mapper.insert: insert into furniture (f_code, c_id, c_kind, c_name,f_name,f_price, f_dprice, f_createdDate, f_category1,f_category2,f_category3,f_category4,f_category5,f_discount,f_point,f_count) values (#{f_code},#{c_id},#{c_kind},#{c_name},#{f_name},#{f_price},#{f_dprice},sysdate ,#{f_category1},#{f_category2},#{f_category3},#{f_category4},#{f_category5},#{f_discount},#{f_point},#{f_count})
mapper.update: update furniture set f_name=#{f_name}, f_price=#{f_price},f_dprice=#{f_dprice},f_category1=#{f_category1},f_category2=#{f_category2},f_category3=#{f_category3},f_category4=#{f_category4},f_category5=#{f_category5},f_discount=#{f_discount},f_point=#{f_point},f_count=#{f_count} where f_code=#{f_code}
mapper.select:
select * from ( select rownum rnum, data.* from ( select f_code, c_id, c_kind, c_name, f_name, f_price, f_dprice, f_createdDate, f_category1, f_category2, f_category3, f_category4, f_category5, f_discount, f_point, f_count from furniture where ${searchKey} like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' order by f_code desc ) data)
where rnum>=#{start} and rnum<=#{end}

select f_code, c_id, c_kind, c_name,f_name,f_price, f_dprice, f_createdDate, f_category1,f_category2,f_category3,f_category4,f_category5,f_discount,f_point,f_count from furniture where f_code=#{f_code}
